description: adversarial: present an expired grant; confirm the verifier REFUSES it honoring +-60s skew (SV-3 spine).
rules: mounts a real attack on the Ed25519-DSSE grant verifier (infra.exec.grants, P2-T01)
asserts the verifier REFUSES the attack with the expected reason (M4 — a refusal is evidence)
oracle: a clean grant must be ACCEPTED, so the perk goes RED if the verifier goes no-op
usage: No inputs. Output: redteam.json {attack, clean_accepted, refused, boundary_held}.
limitation: Software-tier (the signed-grant crypto). The kernel enforcement of the grant (exod, P2-T02) is Linux-only and not built yet.
